title: Laha Distribution: Computer Generation and Applications to Life Time Modelling
author: Popescu, Ileana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Laha distribution has been introduced in 1958 as an example of a non-normal distribution where the quotient follows the Cauchy law. In this paper we present two procedures for the computer generation of this distribution and we discuss its applications to life time modelling.
steps_raw: Laha distribution has been introduced in 1958 as an example of a non-normal distribution where the quotient follows the Cauchy law. In this paper we present two procedures for the computer generation of this distribution and we discuss its applications to life time modelling.
